meaning: adj.[医]对肾脏有害处的,足以危害肾脏的
examples: METHODS: NTN model was established with rabbit-anti-rat nephrotoxic serum.
Methods A rat model of accelerated nephrotoxic serum nephritis with NS was used in this study.
METHODS: Nephrotoxic serum nephritis model of rat was created by Clarkes method, and changes in ultrastructure of kidney were examined.
